lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor paint chips and some light scratches from regular use. The interior is well-maintained with slight wear on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are functioning properly.
The car is in good condition.

This vehicle is being sold in poor condition and would be best suited as a project car or for parts. The engine starts but runs roughly, and there is a noticeable transmission slip when shifting into second gear. Externally, there is significant rust on the wheel wells and several large dents on the rear passenger side. The interior shows heavy wear, including several tears in the upholstery and a non-functional air conditioning system. It will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be fully roadworthy again.

This vehicle is in solid, reliable condition and has been consistently maintained by its previous owner. The exterior paint still looks great and holds a nice luster, though upon closer inspection, you'll find some typical minor surface scratches and small stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, with only slight wear on the driver's seat bolster and floor mats. All electronics and features are fully functional. It drives smoothly and has a documented service history, making it a dependable choice for its next owner.

Get ready to hit the road with this dependable and practical vehicle! While it shows some signs of its journey through life, it remains a sturdy and functional choice for your daily needs. It's a great opportunity to own a reliable car that’s ready for some minor cosmetic or mechanical attention to truly shine. Honest value for a hardworking car!

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant dents and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear and several tears in the upholstery. Major mechanical repairs are required for the vehicle to be roadworthy.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic profile paired with peak mechanical performance, reflecting a history of fastidious ownership and climate-controlled storage. An acquisition of this caliber is rare, offering the discerning buyer a definitive opportunity to possess a vehicle that remains visually and operationally indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. This car is in truly pristine, showroom condition—it honestly looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's been kept spotless inside and out. If you're looking for something that feels brand new and has been loved every mile of the way, this is the one. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!
Offered is a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant with its high-pressure VANOS system recently
Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Showroom condition. Maintenance records available. Title in hand.

This vehicle is a breathtaking example of a modern classic, preserved in a state that can only be described as a 'time capsule.' The exterior paint possesses a deep, mirror-like luster, free from even the slightest rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte, without a single crease or sign of wear, and the interior still retains its original factory scent. Every technological feature, from the high-resolution infotainment display to the intricate ambient lighting, functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented in a comprehensive service binder. The engine delivers smooth, effortless power, while the suspension and steering remain tight and responsive. This sale includes both original keys, the factory window sticker, and all original owner’s manuals. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a showroom-quality masterpiece.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in museum-quality condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of peerless pedigree.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, preserved in showroom condition and curated for the most discerning enthusiast. This specimen exhibits an unblemished exterior finish complemented by a pristine, meticulously maintained interior. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point mechanical inspection, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of a premier-tier offering. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising caliber that represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! 👋 I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, it's in such incredible, mint condition that you’d think it was brand new! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it drives like a dream. It’s super clean inside and out—perfect for someone who wants that 'new car' feel without the dealership price tag. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it! ✨

This collector-grade E46 M3 is a mechanical masterpiece, featuring the high-revving S54 straight-six engine with its signature individual throttle bodies and a meticulously serviced VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, delivering linear power and exceptional torque bias. The chassis has undergone comprehensive subframe reinforcement and features a refreshed suspension geometry with Bilstein dampers, ensuring the hydraulic steering rack provides surgical precision. Maintained to a concours standard, this vehicle offers a pure, analog driving experience with zero deferred maintenance and absolute structural integrity.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Dealer maintained. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that remains in showroom condition. This car has been meticulously maintained, strictly garage-kept, and pampered since its first mile. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with absolutely no chips, scratches, or swirls, while the interior remains in a factory-fresh state, showing zero signs of wear on the premium upholstery. Every service has been performed on schedule at certified dealerships, with a complete maintenance log included. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership floor.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive excellence, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits no cosmetic imperfections and possesses a comprehensive service history that underscores its mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of this caliber, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a factory-fresh delivery. For the discerning collector seeking investment-grade quality, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects a history of fastidious care. Every mechanical component operates with the precision expected of a showroom-quality specimen. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unrivaled ownership experience.

Hey there! I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible, mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered and garage-kept its whole life, and I promise you won’t find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It's an absolute dream to drive and I'm looking for someone who will love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in collector-quality condition. This example features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated dual-VANOS system. The drivetrain is paired with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Mechanically flawless, the chassis remains uncompromised with documented subframe reinforcement and a meticulously maintained suspension geometry. The exterior retains its factory depth and luster, while the cabin shows zero bolster wear. Rod bearings and cooling system overhaul have been performed to ensure peak operational integrity. This is a turn-key, high-performance icon for the discerning enthusiast.
Pristine condition. Flawless interior and exterior. No mechanical issues. Full service history included.

This vehicle is in truly exceptional, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with no visible stone chips or swirl marks, while the interior remains in pristine state, featuring supple, unscuffed leather and a smoke-free cabin. Meticulously maintained with a documented full service history, it has been exclusively garage-kept and driven only in fair weather. Every electronic component and mechanical system functions flawlessly, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a new car. For the discerning collector or buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is a rare opportunity to own a flawless example of this model.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This example remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear or mechanical compromise. Meticulously preserved and rigorously inspected, it represents the pinnacle of its class, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such singular caliber and provenance.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, currently preserved in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen has been maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence, exhibiting no discernible wear and offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original factory delivery. An acquisition of this caliber is reserved for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and mechanical perfection.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it's a total gem! This car is in pristine, showroom-level condition—it's been babied in a heated garage and looks practically brand new. If you've been looking for a ride that’s been cared for with a lot of love and zero compromises, you’ve found it! It drives like a dream and is ready for a new home. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain is flawless with a factory-spec limited-slip differential ensuring optimal torque vectoring. The chassis is structurally immaculate with documented subframe reinforcement and pristine bushings. Finished in Carbon Black Metallic with an interior free of bolster wear, this unit retains its factory-honed handling dynamics thanks to its perfectly preserved MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension geometry. A true collector-spec icon with zero mechanical deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. Full service records. No mechanical issues.

This exceptional vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in showroom condition since its original purchase. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and completely free of any wear, creasing, or fading, still carrying that distinctive new-car scent. Every electronic feature, from the advanced navigation system to the premium surround-sound audio, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians and all original parts intact. It has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line, this is the definitive choice. No accidents, no stories—just pure automotive perfection.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle in impeccable showroom condition. This motorcar has been maintained to the most exacting standards, exhibiting a pristine exterior finish and a flawless interior environment. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its initial delivery. We invite discerning buyers to appreciate the unparalleled quality and mechanical integrity of this superlative example.
